requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Authorised Local Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商/授权本地代理人要求
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商/授權本地代理人要求

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers exporting wireless or telecom terminal equipment to Thailand are typically required to engage a local Thai importer or authorised representative to apply for and maintain NBTC type approval. The local agent or importer acts as the point of contact with NBTC, is responsible for compliance documentation, and must ensure the NBTC type approval certificate number appears on Thai-language product labels. The importer or local agent may also bear responsibility for ongoing post-market compliance and recall obligations under Thai consumer protection and telecommunications regulations. Products without a designated Thai importer or authorised agent face significant hurdles in the NBTC type approval application process.
summary.zh: 向泰国出口无线或电信终端设备的外国制造商通常须委任当地泰国进口商或授权代表，以申请并维持NBTC型式批准。当地代理人或进口商充当与NBTC的联系方，负责合规文件，并须确保NBTC型式批准证书编号以泰语标注于产品标签上。进口商或当地代理人还可能依据泰国消费者保护和电信法规承担持续的市场监督合规及召回义务。未指定泰国进口商或授权代理人的产品在申请NBTC型式批准时将面临重大障碍。
summary.zht: 向泰國出口無線或電信終端設備的外國製造商通常須委任當地泰國進口商或授權代表，以申請並維持NBTC型式批准。當地代理人或進口商充當與NBTC的聯繫方，負責合規文件，並須確保NBTC型式批准證書編號以泰語標注於產品標籤上。進口商或當地代理人還可能依據泰國消費者保護和電信法規承擔持續的市場監督合規及召回義務。未指定泰國進口商或授權代理人的產品在申請NBTC型式批准時將面臨重大障礙。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunications Business Act BE 2544 (Thailand) — importer and licensee obligations
NBTC type approval procedures and local representative requirements (NBTC, Thailand)
Consumer Protection Act BE 2522 and amendments (Thailand)

summary.en: For domestic Chinese market approval, foreign manufacturers can apply directly or through an authorised Chinese representative for SRRC radio type approval and MIIT network access license (NAL). CCC applications are made through a CNCA-designated certification body; a Chinese factory or authorised agent can apply. There is no strict requirement for a formal in-country importer equivalent to the Thai model under the Chinese domestic approval framework, though local distributors typically handle compliance obligations in practice.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场批准，外国制造商可直接或通过中国授权代表申请SRRC无线电型式核准及工业和信息化部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC申请通过CNCA指定的认证机构提出，中国工厂或授权代理人均可申请。在中国国内批准框架下，无等同于泰国模式的严格境内进口商要求，但当地经销商在实践中通常承担合规义务。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場批准，外國製造商可直接或通過中國授權代表申請SRRC無線電型式核准及工業和信息化部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC申請通過CNCA指定的認證機構提出，中國工廠或授權代理人均可申請。在中國國內批准框架下，無等同於泰國模式的嚴格境內進口商要求，但當地經銷商在實踐中通常承擔合規義務。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (MIIT/SRRC — applicant requirements)

gap.en: The Thai regulatory model requires a local importer or authorised agent to be designated for NBTC type approval applications, creating a compliance gap compared with the Chinese SRRC/MIIT/CCC model where the manufacturer or their authorised representative can apply without necessarily having a registered in-country entity. Chinese exporters who sell directly into Thailand must establish or appoint a local Thai importer or authorised agent before initiating NBTC type approval. The agent or importer contact information and the NBTC type approval certificate number must appear on Thai-language packaging or product labels.
gap.zh: 泰国监管模式要求委任当地进口商或授权代理人申请NBTC型式批准，与中国SRRC/MIIT/CCC模式（制造商或授权代表无需境内注册实体即可申请）存在合规差距。直接向泰国销售的中国出口商须在启动NBTC型式批准申请前建立或委任泰国当地进口商或授权代理人。代理人或进口商联系信息及NBTC型式批准证书编号须以泰语标注于包装或产品标签上。
gap.zht: 泰國監管模式要求委任當地進口商或授權代理人申請NBTC型式批准，與中國SRRC/MIIT/CCC模式（製造商或授權代表無需境內註冊實體即可申請）存在合規差距。直接向泰國銷售的中國出口商須在啟動NBTC型式批准申請前建立或委任泰國當地進口商或授權代理人。代理人或進口商聯繫資訊及NBTC型式批准證書編號須以泰語標注於包裝或產品標籤上。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (practical requirement) — in-country Thai importer or authorised local agent required for NBTC type approval application and ongoing compliance; NBTC certificate number and importer/agent information required on Thai-language product label
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory in equivalent form — manufacturer or authorised representative can apply for SRRC/MIIT/CCC approvals directly without a strict in-country importer requirement under the Chinese domestic approval framework

source.publisher: National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC), Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Thai NBTC type approval applications for foreign manufacturers typically require a local Thai importer or authorised agent as a practical prerequisite. This differs from the Chinese SRRC/MIIT/CCC model where no equivalent in-country entity is strictly required. Chinese exporters must identify and appoint a Thai local agent before initiating NBTC type approval. The NBTC type approval certificate number and agent or importer contact information must appear on Thai-language product labels or packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 外国制造商申请泰国NBTC型式批准通常须以委任当地泰国进口商或授权代理人为实际前提条件。这与中国SRRC/MIIT/CCC模式不同，后者无严格等同的境内实体要求。中国出口商须在启动NBTC型式批准申请前确定并委任泰国本地代理人。NBTC型式批准证书编号及代理人或进口商联系信息须以泰语标注于产品标签或包装上。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 外國製造商申請泰國NBTC型式批准通常須以委任當地泰國進口商或授權代理人為實際前提條件。這與中國SRRC/MIIT/CCC模式不同，後者無嚴格等同的境內實體要求。中國出口商須在啟動NBTC型式批准申請前確定並委任泰國本地代理人。NBTC型式批准證書編號及代理人或進口商聯繫資訊須以泰語標注於產品標籤或包裝上。
